creator: weberbug@gmx.de
text:
Got xorgxrdp: 0.2.18_2 -> 0.2.18_3

Problem has changed somewhat. Blue Screen after login.

/usr/local/etc/xrdp/startwm.sh

exec xterm

No user startwm.sh
